gui.text_chat.setup.title: Setup Simple Text Chat
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_1: Welcome to Simple Text Chat, a simple mod that bring you talking-chatting experience!
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_2: Here are some config to do now.
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_3: First, download a Vosk model for voice recognization.
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_4: Second, select a working mode you prefer!
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_5: Finally, after setup, you can enjoy unique talking-chatting experience!
gui.text_chat.setup.model.tooltip: After clicking this button, a browser screen will open. Download models you like and extract them somewhere, then enter the folder path in the edit box left.
gui.text_chat.setup.verify.tooltip: Make sure you have downloaded models correctly!
enum.text_chat.modes.hold_to_speak.toolt: Press the Function Key once to recognize, then press it again to send message.
enum.text_chat.modes.press_send.tooltip: Recognize continuously, send message on pressing the Function Key.
enum.text_chat.modes.auto_detect.tooltip: Recognize continuously, send message when detect a sentence's end.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.text_chat: A simple mod that allows you to chat with voices while playing by recognize your voice to chat messages.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.text_chat: A simple mod that brings you a talking-chatting experience!
